“I accept and celebrate that for me, you are a life-changing event that will be the center & ground for me, that I experience things like intimacy and connection with you that I will experience with no one…

I have been so scared of hurting you

what I saw in you was me 
what I loved about you was me

just like I do for myself

because my heart & intentions were pure

as free as I said I wanted you to be 

because I gifted my gifts to me

I passed every test with flying colours

and I loved so much along the way. and I discovered so much along the way. bc I really, truly BECAME
